metadata.name: Manage Regional Blackout for a Sports Game

description: Due to broadcast rights, a live football game must be blacked out for viewers in a specific city. An agent must apply the blackout rule.

nodes.task_description: Identify the live game feed and the specific geographic region (zip codes) for the blackout.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the game and the list of affected zip codes.

nodes.task_description: Apply the blackout rule to the content delivery system, blocking access for users in the specified zip codes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully configures the system to enforce the blackout.

nodes.task_description: Configure the system to show a 'This game is not available in your area' message to the blocked users.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets up the correct messaging for affected users.
